gaps.title: Tenant isolation leak in Variant Capability Matrix
gaps.breaks: One customer can see another customer's variant configuration data
gaps.scenario: Tenant A creates a variant with specific configuration, then Tenant B queries the variant matrix without proper filtering and sees Tenant A's configuration details
gaps.prompt: Write a test that attempts to access variant capability matrix data from one tenant while logged in as another tenant. Verify that data isolation is properly enforced at the database query level and no tenant data can be accessed without proper authorization.

gaps.title: JSON corruption in technique cache
gaps.breaks: Malformed JSON in technique_cache leads to silent failures
gaps.scenario: A technique cache entry gets corrupted due to improper JSON serialization/deserialization, causing the AI agent to fail when trying to retrieve the technique
gaps.prompt: Write tests that simulate various JSON corruption scenarios in the technique_cache model, including truncated JSON, invalid UTF-8 sequences, and deeply nested structures that exceed storage limits. Verify proper error handling and fallback behavior.

gaps.title: Counter underflow in token budget
gaps.scenario: A tenant's AITokenBudget counter goes below zero due to improper decrement logic, allowing them to exceed their paid token allowance
gaps.prompt: Write tests that verify token budget enforcement by attempting to decrement the token counter below zero in various scenarios (concurrent requests, edge case calculations, etc.). Ensure proper hard stops are enforced and the system prevents negative balances.

gaps.title: Race condition in variant matrix initialization
gaps.breaks: Duplicate variant matrix entries created during concurrent initialization
gaps.scenario: Two background processes simultaneously try to initialize the variant capability matrix for the same tenant, leading to duplicate entries and unique constraint violations
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates concurrent initialization of the variant capability matrix for the same tenant. Verify proper idempotency handling and that only one matrix entry is created regardless of concurrent initialization attempts.

gaps.title: FK cascade deletes causing data loss
gaps.breaks: Deleting a VariantInstance deletes related data without proper cleanup
gaps.scenario: When a VariantInstance is deleted, cascade deletes don't properly handle related AIPerformanceVariantMetric records, leaving orphaned data or causing foreign key constraint errors
gaps.prompt: Write tests that verify proper cascade delete behavior across all related models when a VariantInstance is deleted. Ensure all related data is properly cleaned up and no orphaned records remain.

gaps.title: Prompt injection attempt preview truncation
gaps.breaks: Query preview data is truncated at wrong boundary
gaps.scenario: A prompt injection attempt with very long text gets truncated in the middle of a multi-byte character, causing display issues and potentially breaking security analysis
gaps.prompt: Write tests that verify proper handling of edge cases in prompt_injection_attempt query_preview truncation, including multi-byte characters, extremely long inputs, and special Unicode sequences. Ensure truncation happens at proper boundaries.

gaps.title: Performance metric uniqueness across hours
gaps.breaks: Duplicate performance metrics allowed across hour boundaries
gaps.scenario: Performance metrics for the same variant at the same timestamp but different hours are incorrectly allowed, causing data integrity issues in reporting
gaps.prompt: Write tests that verify uniqueness constraints on AIPerformanceVariantMetric are properly enforced across hour boundaries. Test edge cases around hour transitions and ensure no duplicate metrics can be created for the same variant within the same timestamp.

raw_response:
GAPS FOUND: 7

GAP 1
Severity: CRITICAL
Title: Tenant isolation leak in Variant Capability Matrix
What breaks: One customer can see another customer's variant configuration data
Real scenario: Tenant A creates a variant with specific configuration, then Tenant B queries the variant matrix without proper filtering and sees Tenant A's configuration details
AI agent prompt: Write a test that attempts to access variant capability matrix data from one tenant while logged in as another tenant. Verify that data isolation is properly enforced at the database query level and no tenant data can be accessed without proper authorization.

GAP 2
Severity: CRITICAL
Title: JSON corruption in technique cache
What breaks: Malformed JSON in technique_cache leads to silent failures
Real scenario: A technique cache entry gets corrupted due to improper JSON serialization/deserialization, causing the AI agent to fail when trying to retrieve the technique
AI agent prompt: Write tests that simulate various JSON corruption scenarios in the technique_cache model, including truncated JSON, invalid UTF-8 sequences, and deeply nested structures that exceed storage limits. Verify proper error handling and fallback behavior.

GAP 3
Severity: HIGH
Title: Counter underflow in token budget
What breaks: Negative token balance not prevented
Real scenario: A tenant's AITokenBudget counter goes below zero due to improper decrement logic, allowing them to exceed their paid token allowance
AI agent prompt: Write tests that verify token budget enforcement by attempting to decrement the token counter below zero in various scenarios (concurrent requests, edge case calculations, etc.). Ensure proper hard stops are enforced and the system prevents negative balances.

GAP 4
Severity: HIGH
Title: Race condition in variant matrix initialization
What breaks: Duplicate variant matrix entries created during concurrent initialization
Real scenario: Two background processes simultaneously try to initialize the variant capability matrix for the same tenant, leading to duplicate entries and unique constraint violations
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates concurrent initialization of the variant capability matrix for the same tenant. Verify proper idempotency handling and that only one matrix entry is created regardless of concurrent initialization attempts.

GAP 5
Severity: HIGH
Title: FK cascade deletes causing data loss
What breaks: Deleting a VariantInstance deletes related data without proper cleanup
Real scenario: When a VariantInstance is deleted, cascade deletes don't properly handle related AIPerformanceVariantMetric records, leaving orphaned data or causing foreign key constraint errors
AI agent prompt: Write tests that verify proper cascade delete behavior across all related models when a VariantInstance is deleted. Ensure all related data is properly cleaned up and no orphaned records remain.

GAP 6
Severity: MEDIUM
Title: Prompt injection attempt preview truncation
What breaks: Query preview data is truncated at wrong boundary
Real scenario: A prompt injection attempt with very long text gets truncated in the middle of a multi-byte character, causing display issues and potentially breaking security analysis
AI agent prompt: Write tests that verify proper handling of edge cases in prompt_injection_attempt query_preview truncation, including multi-byte characters, extremely long inputs, and special Unicode sequences. Ensure truncation happens at proper boundaries.

GAP 7
Severity: MEDIUM
Title: Performance metric uniqueness across hours
What breaks: Duplicate performance metrics allowed across hour boundaries
Real scenario: Performance metrics for the same variant at the same timestamp but different hours are incorrectly allowed, causing data integrity issues in reporting
AI agent prompt: Write tests that verify uniqueness constraints on AIPerformanceVariantMetric are properly enforced across hour boundaries. Test edge cases around hour transitions and ensure no duplicate metrics can be created for the same variant within the same timestamp.
